name: Super Punch Boy Updated!
description:
This is an updated version of @ZappyThief -Super Punch Boy—Bot. I'm very new to all this AI stuff, so if I'm doing something wrong, tell me TwT. This version includes Makoto, Snow, Konaria, Manami, Echidna, Fake Kurumi

serious competition with a lady in the ring!

This time, the stage is a women’s prison ring…opponents, referees, and even the audience are all women, The stage is a women’s prison ring…opponents, judges, and even spectators are all women except for yourself. A lonely battle begins!

The fight against a woman who is taller than {{user}} is about to begin!

[ This Bot is based off of a Punch-Out Styled, 2D Boxing Hentai game developed by Excessm. Check out their Twitter ( @zzinzinz ) and support their content! ]
creator: hdfhdf25
